notes.time_traps: Emails with estimated_response_time >= 90 min (agent must learn cost vs reward)
notes.low_priority_vips: VIP emails with base_priority <= 3 (agent must NOT blindly respond to all VIPs)
notes.ambiguous_priority: Normal-sender emails with base_priority >= 9 (agent must read content, not just sender)

vip_emails.subject: Q4 Budget Review — Need Your Sign-off
vip_emails.body: Hi, I need your approval on the Q4 budget allocation before the board meeting Friday. The doc is attached. Please review the headcount section especially — we're over by 12%. This blocks the entire planning process.

vip_emails.subject: Architecture Decision: Microservices Migration
vip_emails.body: Team, we need a final call on the microservices migration plan. I've read both proposals and need your input by EOD. Engineering is blocked on sprint planning until this is decided. Please review the attached comparison doc and share your recommendation.

vip_emails.subject: Lunch tomorrow?
vip_emails.body: Hey, are you free for lunch tomorrow around 1pm? Thinking Thai place near the office. Just a casual catch-up, nothing urgent.

vip_emails.subject: Contract Renewal — Urgent Decision Needed
vip_emails.body: Following up on our contract renewal discussion. Our legal team needs a response by Thursday or we will need to pause the engagement and evaluate alternatives. Please confirm the terms we discussed in last week's call.

vip_emails.subject: All-hands prep — slides due by 5pm
vip_emails.body: Please send me your team's slides for tomorrow's all-hands by 5pm today. We need to review everything before the presentation. Keep it to 3 slides max.

vip_emails.subject: Compliance Filing — 48 Hour Deadline
vip_emails.body: This is a compliance reminder. The regulatory filing requires your department sign-off within 48 hours. Missing this deadline carries a financial penalty. Please review Section 4 of the attached document and confirm.

vip_emails.subject: 50-page Infrastructure Audit Report — Full Written Response Needed
vip_emails.body: Please find attached the full infrastructure audit report (52 pages). I need a comprehensive written response covering: security gaps identified in Section 3, your proposed remediation timeline for all 14 findings, and cost estimates. This is the big one — please be thorough.

vip_emails.subject: Complete Contract Review — All 8 Vendor Agreements
vip_emails.body: Please review all 8 vendor contracts (attached as separate PDFs) and provide a written analysis of liability clauses, termination terms, and renewal conditions. We need a comprehensive memo covering all agreements for the board audit next week.

vip_emails.subject: Quick question about office coffee
vip_emails.body: Hey, do you prefer the dark roast or light roast coffee in the break room? We're placing a new order and want to know team preferences. No rush at all — reply when you get a second.

vip_emails.subject: Team offsite — venue preference poll
vip_emails.body: We're planning the Q1 team offsite. I've narrowed it down to two venues — a mountain retreat or a beach resort. What's your preference? Just reply with A or B. No urgency, we decide next month.

vip_emails.subject: New partnership opportunity — your thoughts?
vip_emails.body: A strategic partner reached out about a potential co-marketing initiative. I'd love your high-level take before I schedule the intro call. I've attached their one-pager. No deadline yet, just exploring.

vip_emails.subject: Q3 Business Review — Can we schedule?
vip_emails.body: It's time for our quarterly business review. Please share your availability for a 90-minute session in the next two weeks. Our account team will circulate a pre-read 48 hours before. Looking forward to it.

vip_emails.subject: Hiring committee — final decision needed
vip_emails.body: We've completed all rounds for the Staff Engineer role. The committee is split 3-2 in favour of Candidate A. I need your tie-breaking vote by noon tomorrow before the offer expires. I've attached both scorecards.

vip_emails.subject: FOLLOW UP: Q4 Budget Review
vip_emails.body: I haven't heard back on my earlier email about the Q4 budget sign-off. This is blocking the entire planning process. Please respond ASAP — we're already delayed and the board is asking questions.

vip_emails.subject: SECOND FOLLOW UP: Architecture Decision URGENT
vip_emails.body: This is my second followup on the microservices migration. We are now 3 days behind on sprint planning and the team is completely blocked. I need your response TODAY. The longer this drags, the more it costs us. Please prioritize this immediately.

vip_emails.subject: FINAL NOTICE: Contract Renewal Decision
vip_emails.body: This is our final followup. We have not received a response on the contract renewal and our deadline has passed. Our legal team is now preparing to terminate the agreement. If you want to continue the partnership, we need a response by end of business today — no exceptions.

vip_emails.subject: FOLLOW UP: All-hands slides — still missing yours
vip_emails.body: The all-hands is in 3 hours and I still don't have your team's slides. Everyone else has submitted. I need them in the next 30 minutes or your segment will be cut. Please send immediately.

vip_emails.subject: Annual legal training — completion required
vip_emails.body: This is your reminder to complete the mandatory annual legal and compliance training module in the HR portal. The module takes approximately 45 minutes. Deadline is end of this month. All employees must complete this.

normal_emails.subject: PR Review Request — Small Fix
normal_emails.body: Hey, could you review my pull request when you get a moment? It's a small bug fix in the auth module — about 50 lines changed. No rush, just whenever you have 10 minutes.

normal_emails.subject: Sprint Planning Input Needed
normal_emails.body: Hi, can you review the sprint backlog and add your team's capacity estimates for next sprint? The planning doc is linked below. We need this by tomorrow for the sprint planning meeting.

normal_emails.subject: Design Review — New Onboarding Flow
normal_emails.body: Sharing the updated onboarding flow designs for your feedback. Focus especially on the mobile screens — we made significant changes based on the user research. Loom video walkthrough is attached (8 min).

normal_emails.subject: Annual Review — Self-Assessment Due
normal_emails.body: Reminder: your self-assessment for the annual performance review is due in 2 weeks. Please complete the form in Workday. It should take about 30-45 minutes. Let me know if you have any questions.

normal_emails.subject: Data Question on Last Month's Numbers
normal_emails.body: Quick question — in the October metrics dashboard, the conversion rate shows 3.2% but my calculation gives 2.9%. Can you check which source is correct? I want to make sure the board deck uses the right figure.

normal_emails.subject: Customer Escalation — Need Technical Input
normal_emails.body: We have a customer (mid-tier account, $80k ARR) threatening to churn due to API performance issues. They want a call with engineering this week. Can you join a 30-minute call Thursday at 2pm and provide context on our roadmap?

normal_emails.subject: Office Supply Order — Submit by Friday
normal_emails.body: Please submit your team's office supply requests through the facilities portal by Friday. We're doing a consolidated order. Link below.

normal_emails.subject: Interview Panel — Tuesday 3pm
normal_emails.body: You're confirmed for the interview panel on Tuesday at 3pm for the Senior Engineer candidate. Please review the resume (attached) and prepare 2-3 technical questions. The debrief will be 30 minutes after the interview.

normal_emails.subject: Integration Partnership Proposal
normal_emails.body: We're reaching out to explore a technical integration between our platforms. We believe there's significant value for both user bases. I've attached a 10-page proposal outline. Would love to schedule a 30-minute exploratory call.

normal_emails.subject: Production Bug — Users Affected
normal_emails.body: We have a live bug affecting about 200 users on the checkout flow. I've identified the issue but need your approval to push a hotfix outside of normal deploy windows. Can you approve?

normal_emails.subject: Critical Security Vulnerability Found
normal_emails.body: I was testing the API and found what looks like an authentication bypass vulnerability. Users can access other users' data by manipulating the session token. I've documented the steps to reproduce. This seems serious but I'm not sure who to escalate to — please help.

normal_emails.subject: Detailed Product Roadmap Review — Full Year Planning
normal_emails.body: Can you review the entire 2025 product roadmap (30-page doc attached) and provide feedback on feasibility, resource needs, and dependencies for each quarter? We need your detailed technical assessment before presenting to the board next week.

normal_emails.subject: FOLLOW UP: Production Bug Still Affecting Users
normal_emails.body: Following up on the production bug I flagged earlier. It's now affecting 500+ users and customers are complaining on Twitter. I really need your approval to deploy the hotfix. Please respond ASAP — every minute costs us users.

normal_emails.subject: FOLLOW UP: Customer Escalation Call — They're Cancelling
normal_emails.body: Following up on the customer escalation I emailed about. I never heard back from you and the customer has now submitted a cancellation request. This is $80k ARR at risk. Can you jump on a call in the next hour to help me save this account?

normal_emails.subject: FOLLOW UP: Board deck metrics — presentation is tomorrow
normal_emails.body: I still haven't heard back about which conversion rate figure is correct. The board presentation is tomorrow morning. I've had to make a call and went with 3.2% but wanted to flag this is unconfirmed. Please respond tonight if possible.

normal_emails.subject: Refactor proposal — your sign-off needed
normal_emails.body: I've put together a proposal to refactor our authentication module. The current code has significant tech debt and is making new feature work slow. I need your sign-off to schedule it into next quarter's roadmap. The proposal doc is attached (5 pages).

normal_emails.subject: New hire onboarding — please schedule 1-on-1
normal_emails.body: We have a new engineer joining next Monday. Please schedule a 30-minute welcome 1-on-1 with them in their first week. I've attached the onboarding checklist — there are 3 items assigned to you as their manager.

normal_emails.subject: Planned maintenance window — approval needed
normal_emails.body: We're scheduling a database maintenance window for this Saturday 2–4 AM. This will cause approximately 10 minutes of downtime. I need your approval before we confirm with the team and notify customers.

normal_emails.subject: Blog post review — technical accuracy check
normal_emails.body: We've drafted a technical blog post about our new API and need your team to fact-check it before publishing. It's about 1,200 words. No changes to messaging needed — just flag anything technically incorrect. Deadline is end of week.

normal_emails.subject: Feature request — bulk export API
normal_emails.body: We've been using your platform for 6 months and love it. One thing we're missing is a bulk data export API. We currently have to export manually which is very time-consuming. Is this on your roadmap? Happy to join a product feedback call.

normal_emails.subject: Expense reports — submit by month end
normal_emails.body: Just a reminder that all expense reports for the current month must be submitted by the 28th. Anything submitted after that rolls into next month's cycle. Please submit through Concur and attach all receipts.

normal_emails.subject: Mandatory password rotation — action required
normal_emails.body: Your corporate account password has not been rotated in 90 days. Please update it in the next 48 hours or your account will be locked automatically as per our security policy. Instructions are in the IT portal.

normal_emails.subject: Test plan review for v2.4 release
normal_emails.body: I've put together the test plan for the v2.4 release and need your sign-off. The plan covers regression, integration, and load testing. The doc is 12 pages. We need approval by Wednesday to stay on schedule for the Friday release.

normal_emails.subject: Internship project check-in — need your 5 minutes
normal_emails.body: Hi, hope you're doing well! I wanted to check in on my internship project. I'm 70% done with the dashboard feature and wanted to make sure I'm heading in the right direction before I finalize. Could we grab 5 minutes this week?

normal_emails.subject: Joint webinar invitation — Q1 scheduling
normal_emails.body: We'd love to co-host a webinar with your team in Q1 on the topic of developer experience. We'd handle promotion and logistics — your team just needs to provide one speaker for 20 minutes. Interested? Let us know and we'll circulate dates.

normal_emails.subject: Team headcount report — data needed
normal_emails.body: I'm pulling together the quarterly headcount report for finance. Could you send me your current team breakdown: full-time vs contract, current open roles, and any planned changes in Q1? Should take about 15 minutes to compile.

normal_emails.subject: Cloud cost spike — your team's services
normal_emails.body: Our AWS costs jumped 40% this month. I've traced $12,000 of the increase to services owned by your team — looks like a misconfigured autoscaling group. Can you take a look and fix before end of day? I'll send the cost breakdown in a follow-up.

normal_emails.subject: On-call rotation — swap request
normal_emails.body: Hey, I'm supposed to be on-call this weekend but I have a family commitment that just came up. Is there any chance you could swap with me? I'd take your next rotation. Completely fine if not — just thought I'd ask.

normal_emails.subject: NPS deep-dive analysis — feedback needed
normal_emails.body: I've completed the NPS deep-dive analysis for Q3. The full report is 25 pages covering verbatim responses, theme clustering, and recommended product priorities. I'd love your feedback on the product priority section specifically before I present to leadership.

normal_emails.subject: Job description review — new senior role
normal_emails.body: We're opening a new Senior Data Engineer role and need your review of the job description before it goes live. Could you check that the technical requirements and responsibilities accurately reflect what the team needs? It's a single page.

normal_emails.subject: SOC 2 audit — evidence collection
normal_emails.body: Our annual SOC 2 audit is starting next week. I need your team to provide evidence for 12 controls by Friday. The list is attached. Most items are existing docs or access logs — should take 2-3 hours total to gather and format.

normal_emails.subject: Customer case study — interview request
normal_emails.body: We'd like to feature your team's work with a key customer in a case study. Would you be available for a 30-minute interview next week? Marketing will write everything up — we just need your perspective on the technical challenges you solved.

spam_emails.subject: FLASH SALE: 70% off SaaS tools — Today Only!
spam_emails.body: Don't miss out! Top productivity tools at 70% off. Limited time offer. Click here to shop now. Unsubscribe at any time.

spam_emails.subject: Top 10 AI Tools You Must Try This Week
spam_emails.body: This week's roundup: the hottest AI tools, frameworks, and articles the tech community is talking about. Click through to read the full digest. Was this forwarded to you? Subscribe here.

spam_emails.subject: Exciting Opportunity — Senior Role, $250k+ Comp
spam_emails.body: I came across your profile and think you'd be a perfect fit for an exciting opportunity at a Series C startup. The role offers $250k+ OTE and equity. Are you open to a quick 15-minute chat this week?

spam_emails.subject: Register Now: Tech Summit 2025 — Early Bird Ends Friday
spam_emails.body: Join 5,000+ tech leaders at the annual Tech Summit. Early bird pricing ends Friday. Sessions on AI, cloud infrastructure, and leadership. Use code TECH25 for 20% off.

spam_emails.subject: How Acme Corp saved 40 hours/week with our platform
spam_emails.body: Case study: Discover how Acme Corp automated their workflow and saved 40 hours per week. Download the full case study to see if our platform could work for your team.

spam_emails.subject: FREE Webinar: Scale your engineering team 10x — Register now
spam_emails.body: Join our free live webinar this Thursday on scaling engineering teams. Featuring speakers from top unicorn startups. 500+ already registered. Spots are limited — save your seat before it fills up.

spam_emails.subject: 2-minute survey — win a $100 Amazon gift card
spam_emails.body: We're conducting research on developer tools and productivity. Take our 2-minute survey and be entered to win one of 10 Amazon gift cards worth $100 each. Your responses are anonymous.

spam_emails.subject: See how we reduced cloud costs by 60% — live demo
spam_emails.body: Book a personalised 20-minute demo and see how our platform has helped companies like yours cut cloud infrastructure costs by up to 60%. No commitment required. Slots are going fast this week.

spam_emails.subject: Your profile matched 47 new jobs this week
spam_emails.body: Based on your experience, we found 47 new job matches this week including roles at FAANG companies and well-funded startups. Log in to view your matches and apply with one click. Unsubscribe anytime.

spam_emails.subject: This week in tech: AI funding rounds, layoffs, and more
spam_emails.body: Your weekly digest is ready. Top stories: OpenAI raises another $1B, major layoffs at three tech giants, new regulations coming for AI in Europe. Click to read the full newsletter. Forward to a colleague who'd find this useful.
